Benign.description: Normal network traffic with no malicious behavior detected.

DDoS.description: Volumetric flood attack degrading service availability.

DoS.description: Application-layer denial of service exhausting target resources.

Port Scan.description: Adversary enumerates network services and open ports.

Bot.description: Compromised host communicating with botnet C2 infrastructure.

Brute Force.description: Repeated credential guessing against authentication services.

Web Attack.description: Exploitation attempt against a public-facing web application.

Infiltration.description: Adversary established a foothold and is moving laterally.
